data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplify choices to reduce decision-making time for users.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Optimize button sizes and placements for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Larger touch targets for mobile, intuitive progress bars.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive more aesthetically pleasing interfaces as easier to use.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Organizing content to enhance pattern recognition and user perception.
data.technical_spec: Use of proximity, similarity, and continuity in layout design.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limit the amount of information presented to user at a time.
